name: Molasses Shoo-Fly Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients for the liquid part, mixing well.
2. Combine the dry ingredients for the crumbs, incorporating the shortening.
3. Line a pie pan with pastry.
4. Make alternate layers of crumbs and liquid.
5. Top with crumbs.
6. Bake at 450°F until crust edges start to brown.
7. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake until firm (about 20 minutes).
